common.offline: You are offline. Please check your connection.

landing.subtitle: Upload a PPT and AI will automatically generate lecture videos, scripts, and assessment questions. Track student engagement in real-time and maximize learning with RAG-based Q&A.
landing.whyIFLDesc: An optimized flipped learning experience for both instructors and students
landing.feature1Desc: Upload a PPT and an AI avatar will read the script to automatically generate lecture videos.
landing.feature2Desc: Embed lecture materials to provide accurate context-based answers to student questions.
landing.feature3Desc: Monitor learner viewing progress and response rates in real-time, with alerts for inactivity.
landing.feature4Desc: AI automatically generates formative and summative assessment questions based on lecture content.
landing.feature5Desc: A professor-exclusive dashboard showing attendance, accuracy, engagement, and costs at a glance.
landing.feature6Desc: Automatically translate scripts to multiple languages so international students can learn in their native language.
landing.step1Desc: Upload your existing lecture materials as-is
landing.step2Desc: Review and approve the AI-generated script
landing.step3Desc: Share the video link and learning analytics will start automatically
landing.ctaDesc: Create up to 2 lecture videos per month with the free plan
landing.copyright: © 2025 IFL Platform — Interactive Flipped Learning. All rights reserved.

auth.agreeTerms: By signing in, you agree to the

auth.errorGoogleFailed: Google authentication failed. Please try again later.
auth.registerError: An error occurred. Please try again.

dashboard.noCoursesDescProf: Create a new lecture to start flipped learning.
dashboard.noCoursesDescStudent: Courses will appear here when your professor creates them.
dashboard.noLectures: No lectures in this course yet.

professor.noLecturesDesc: Upload a PPT and AI will automatically generate lecture videos.
professor.pptDragDrop: Drag and drop or click to upload PPT
professor.createError: Failed to create lecture. Please try again.

script.title: Script Editor
script.noScriptDesc: Upload a PPT and AI will automatically generate a script
script.qaPinTiming: Q&A Pin Timing (sec, leave empty for none)
script.approveDesc: Approving the script will start AI avatar video rendering. You cannot edit the script after rendering starts.
script.approveWarning: This will consume 1 monthly rendering credit from your plan.

analytics.title: Lecture Analytics
analytics.noData: No data yet. Analytics will appear once students start watching.
analytics.name: Name

lecture.videoNotReadyDesc: It will appear automatically once rendering is complete
lecture.qaEmpty: Ask questions about the lecture content
lecture.qaError: Failed to generate answer. Please try again.

assess.title: Assessment
assess.noQuestionsDesc: AI will generate assessment questions after you watch the lecture.
assess.unanswered: {count} questions are still unanswered. Submit anyway?
assess.submitWarning: You cannot modify answers after submission.

attention.level1Desc: The video was paused due to inactivity.
attention.level2Desc: This is your second warning. Please focus on the video.
attention.level3Desc: This is your third warning. Press the button below to continue.
attention.resumeHint: Press ESC or Enter to resume

expired.title: Viewing Period Expired
expired.description: The viewing period for this lecture has ended. Please contact your professor.
